title: Engine reaches 23 methods
body: Added KSG transfer entropy and a robustness sweep, plus the published namh package's Hurst-panel and transfer-entropy methods — runnable live in the Workbench on a 24-market G20-plus-commodities panel.

title: NAMH reproduces live
body: The reproduce page now regenerates the Network Adaptive Market Hypothesis Hurst exponents and transfer entropy on real data, matching the working paper to floating-point precision; the surrogate-gated network is shown honestly as pending.

title: Systemic-risk index updates nightly
body: The systemic-risk index now recomputes every night on fresh market data via a scheduled cloud job, appending to the live history.

title: Public portal launched
body: A shareable front door with a 30-second live demo — watch the engine test today's market data and explain it in plain language.

title: Reproduce-the-paper, live
body: A dedicated showcase regenerates a published financial-contagion result on real data and matches the paper, scale by scale.

title: Provenance, permalinks & citations
body: Every result now carries a permalink that re-runs the exact analysis, plus one-click CSV / JSON export and a BibTeX citation.

title: Engine reaches 17 methods
body: Added the published SOCH scale profile, wavelet coherence, rolling Diebold-Yilmaz spillover, and quantile VAR.

title: sochcontagion published
body: The Scale-Ordered Contagion R package is public (v0.1.0, GPL-3) and installable from r-universe.

title: Six econometric methods added (→ 13)
body: VECM cointegration, Granger networks, panel unit roots, Diebold-Yilmaz connectedness, igraph networks, and DCC-GARCH correlations went live.

title: Deep-research assistant
body: A post-doctoral-grade AI analyst that runs live analyses and grounds its answer in real, searched citations.

title: Contagion Channels
body: Channel-level contagion identification — preprint and R package.

title: MCPFM
body: Multi-Channel Path Following Model — a systemic-risk index.
